title: The Boys of Paul Street
writer: Endre Bohem, Zoltán Fábri, Ferenc Molnár
actors: Mari Törocsik, Sándor Pécsi, László Kozák
plot: In Budapest, two rival gangs of young boys lay claim to a vacant lot. The hostilities escalate yet never quite boil over into actual violence. The film poignantly portrays the struggles and resilience of youth amid the harsh reali...
